title: Transparent Surreal Founder Sticker Cutout AI
sourceTitle: Transparent Surreal Founder Sticker Cutout AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Transparent-background surreal social sticker cutout featuring fictional tech founder in black hoodie riding an oversized plush mascot in a playful surreal pose. Subject: fictional tech founder in black hoodie riding an oversized plush mascot in a playful surreal pose is the single playful editorial meme subject, staged as a clean cutout with expressive pose, clear silhouette, and social readability. Scene: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Composition: Fixed transparent sticker composition: one centered surreal subject, full body or near-full body visible, clean edge masking, balanced shadow under the cutout, and enough transparent margin for reuse as a sticker or meme asset. Signature Elements: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Style: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Color Palette: Subject-led palette with black hoodie or startup attire, plush or chrome prop materials, clean neutral shadow, transparent background, and restrained highlight accents. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Materials: Plush fabric or chrome desk-toy surfaces, cotton hoodie texture, clean cutout edge, subtle shadow softness, and crisp transparent-background finish. Typography: transparent-background sticker-style cutout with clean edges and soft studio shadow provides the visible environment while the fixed composition and visual style remain intact. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
